Polaris is a story about a man living two life, one in physical world and other is in Dreamland
when he sleeps, he live in Dreamland, but when the polaris shines, he feel slumber and forced to wake up in the physical world

extra stuff abt Kuranes, he is introduced in Celephais story
the story is about a man dreaming of a prosperous city (Celephais) in Dreamland when he was a child, and desperatedly wished to see the city again in his dream when he grow up, and as his life keep turning for the worse, he grows more reclused, he eventually returned to Celephais as it's king
the real Kuranes died falling off a cliff in his old hometown

embeds.title: Thaïs
embeds.description: Thaïs (; Greek: Θαΐς; fl. 4th century BCE) was a Greek hetaira who accompanied Alexander the Great on his military campaigns. Likely from Athens, she is most famous for having instigated the burning of Persepolis, the capital city of the Achaemenid Persian Empire, after it was conquered by Alexander

embeds.title: Nineveh
embeds.description: Nineveh ( NIN-iv-ə; Akkadian: 𒌷𒉌𒉡𒀀, URUNI.NU.A, Ninua; Biblical Hebrew: נִינְוֵה, Nīnəwē; Arabic: نِينَوَىٰ, Nīnawā; Syriac: ܢܝܼܢܘܹܐ, Nīnwē), also known in early modern times as Kuyunjiq for its northern part, was an ancient Assyrian city of Upper Mesopotamia, located in the modern-day city of Mosul

but they still stole the melon right before we left
to this day she still won't let it go, and we're still wondering *why* of all things would you steal a melon
when they were 10000 other options even in terms of food there

Morimens is card game. And LoR is also card. But it doesn’t explain limbus which is not card
ngl its probably the story quality
Limbus Company is made by people who doesnt know anything about gacha

Well, ultimately it's just a monetization model, not a genre 

But I haven't played LC so idk what kind of approach they took

Full game. Buy once only and get. SCP management type where each abno got rules. And they do x thing when y is met or isn’t met. Sometime good a lot of time bad. And with each new day more abno with different rules get added. And u gotta juggle more and more of them and remember their rules.
So it get harder/tedious later on. A mistake can spiral into several other terrible things happening and it all go down from there.
They get u to rely on pause button then take it away from u for shit and giggle
then *ngela scoop all of my blood and tears for her little rebellion game
I wanna swear profusely at dev at those time
Project Moon, the company that doesnt know about gacha game that make a gacha game.
They make banger story and have great gameplay and story integration but tutorials, UI and smooth difficulty curve is not their forte
There is a reason why the meme of vertical difficulties exist.
"go read shit and try figure it out urself idk" the game
thanks to it I figured out THE ULTIMATE TIPH STRAT though

gib purple tear on 1 nugger, pierce deck have full 0 cost
that nugget only job is play 0 cost to keep hand count all time low
at emotion level 3, pick nihil (the ego card)
purple tear nugget can fulfil nihil's condition (hand empty) bcuz she always play everything in her hand (they're all 0 cost)
pierce purple tear double all debuff
nihil CD is 1 turn
nihil debuff last 2 turn
nihil debuff is -4 everything originally, now it's -8 bcuz pierce purple tear
practically only chinese mod with inflated number can beat that shit
legit everyone reccomendations downloading a specific lobcorp mod that fixes a memory leak
otherwise the game will crash after a specific amount of time
it's the reason I can even do day 49 at all
fun fact: ruina can also lag if you take too long to finish fights because its somehow coded to never repeat the track, it just plays a new instance of the song after the first one ends
